历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15313 → 18443 → 17704 → 20543 → 20981, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3268 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 20981; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Physics Category was 44 in 2021, 45 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 48 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 68, an expansion of about 41.7% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking 2026 about 70th, with recent rankings stable in the 65–70 range, belonging to upper-middle-level comprehensive universities; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism incident of Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the College of Liberal Arts, for which the university has established a special task force to investigate, having a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 81st, rated as average, with low short video exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology was rated A, Archaeology rated A, and Software Engineering rated A-, showing strong disciplinary strength in geology, archaeology, and software, with related majors having some appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, etc.); the expansion of popular majors may attract more high-scoring candidates to compete; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from about 320,000 in 2025 to about 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.3%, intensifying competition, with a downward trend in recent years; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a comprehensive university in the northwest region, and is not a local enrollment in Hunan, with no significant regional preference advantage; the university's total national enrollment is about 5,000, with Hunan enrollment accounting for about 1%, making it a medium-to-small source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the effect of increased slots from the 41.7% expansion in Physics Category in 2026, the intensified competition from an 8.3% increase in Hunan candidates, and the slight suppression of application enthusiasm due to the negative university reputation, with a moderate adjustment for the actual lowering of the threshold due to expansion, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 25726, with a range of 25226–26226.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 25726, with a range of 25226–26226. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer, Software, Mathematics Elite Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials, Geology, Geography) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 25000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (outside 26000) should mainly choose Tier 2 and Tier 3 to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2924 → 3569 → 2941 → 3648 → 3895, showing an overall backward trend with fluctuations, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 3895; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan was 28 students in 2021, 27 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 19 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 24 students, an expansion of about 26.3% compared to 2025, indicating a rebound in enrollment numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the investigation into Jia Qianqian's plagiarism incident, which has a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology; ranked 81st in comprehensive Douyin popularity, with average reviews; Archaeology is rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), highly corresponding to the History Category enrollment majors of Archaeology and History (Base Class), exerting strong appeal for related major applications; Geology A and Software Engineering A- are other advantageous disciplines of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature are recommended as hot choices, while teacher training/education majors are differentiated and wait-and-see; the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province increased significantly from about 143,000 in 2025 to about 187,000 in 2026, an increase of about 31.2%, leading to markedly intensified competition, with an upward trend in recent years; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and is not a local enrollment in Hunan, with no significant regional preference advantage; the university's total national enrollment is about 5,000 students, with Hunan History Category enrollment accounting for about 0.4%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 26.3% expansion in History Category enrollment in 2026, the substantial 31.2% increase in the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province leading to intensified competition, and the appeal of the A+ Archaeology discipline to high-scoring students, given that the growth rate of examinees far exceeds the expansion rate, increasing competitive pressure, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 4610, with a range of 4110–5110.
